---

title: "D01_04: Application Views Generation"
subtitle: "Normalize cleansed outputs into app_data tables and views"
parent: "D01_dna_analysis"
chapter: "CH12"
category: "derivation-task"
number: "D01_04"
date-created: "2025-12-14"
date-modified: "2026-02-08"
author: "Claude"
type: "derivation-task"
depends_on:
  - "D01_02_rfm_calculation"
  - "D01_03_dna_analysis"
consumes:
  - "cleansed_data.df_dna_by_customer___cleansed"
  - "cleansed_data.df_profile_by_customer___cleansed"
outputs_to:
  - "app_data.df_dna_by_customer"
  - "app_data.df_profile_by_customer"
  - "app_data.df_segments_by_customer"
  - "app_data.v_customer_dna_analytics"
implements:
  - script: "cbz_D01_04.R"
    path: "update_scripts/DRV/cbz/"
  - script: "amz_D01_04.R"
    path: "update_scripts/DRV/amz/"
  - script: "eby_D01_04.R"
    path: "update_scripts/DRV/eby/"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    code-fold: false
---

# D01_04: Application Views Generation {#overview}

This task writes final app-facing tables from cleansed DNA/profile outputs.

## Task Definition (NSQL)

```nsql
NORMALIZE FROM cleansed_data.df_dna_by_customer___cleansed
         FROM cleansed_data.df_profile_by_customer___cleansed
TO app_data.df_dna_by_customer
TO app_data.df_profile_by_customer
TO app_data.df_segments_by_customer
```

## Responsibilities

- Consume cleansed DNA/profile tables.
- Delete current platform rows and append refreshed rows to `app_data` tables.
- Create or refresh analytics views:
  - `v_customer_dna_analytics`
  - `v_customer_segments`
  - `v_segment_statistics`

## Rules

1. Preserve `platform_id` and `product_line_id_filter` in final app tables.
2. Use transactional writes for delete + append.
3. Do not recompute DNA logic in this step.

## Next Task

After D01_04, proceed to [D01_05: Final Validation](D01_05_app_views.qmd).
